acceptance_criteria.text: Outreach run review journal shows product stages for sourcing, shortlist, drafts, and queue.
proof: agent_blueprint_workspace maps outreach artifacts to sourcing, shortlist, drafts, and queue journal kinds.
Unit test verifies the product stages.
Production smoke returned required journal kinds.

acceptance_criteria.text: Journal details are human-readable and include source, counts, filters, channels, queue state, and external-send boundary.
proof: Production smoke verified labels from the review endpoint.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing supervised outreach path still uses prospectingleads, approval gates, drafts, queue, and no dispatcher.
proof: Production smoke sourced one prospectingleads row, approved two gates, queued the batch, and verified queued_not_dispatched.

acceptance_criteria.text: Local tests, lint baseline, frontend build, partial production deploy, and production smoke pass.

known_gaps: This phase does not redesign the UI; it improves the backend review payload that UI consumes.
Dispatcher/provider sending remains intentionally out of scope.
A separate pre-existing local src/main.py diff remains uncommitted and was not deployed by the normal whole-src deploy path.
